holes.name: LeanEval.Geometry.SchlafliClassification.schlafli_classification
holes.body:
/-- **Schläfli classification.** `p_3 = 5 ∧ p_4 = 6 ∧ ∀ d ≥ 5, p_d = 3`. -/
theorem schlafli_classification :
    platonicCount 3 = 5 ∧
      platonicCount 4 = 6 ∧
        ∀ d, 5 ≤ d → platonicCount d = 3 := by
  sorry
